args:
set -euo pipefail
/opt/conda/bin/python3.11 -c 'import json; p=json.load(open("/fpct-run/results/immutable_final.json")); assert p["classification"] == "R2M_IMMUTABLE_GO" and p["training_authorized"] is True'
/opt/conda/bin/python3.11 -I /opt/fpct/script/runtime/fpct_bootstrap.py --repo-root /opt/fpct --target /opt/fpct/script/experiment/fpct_confirmatory_runner.py --include-gpu-closure --attestation-out /fpct-run/attestations/matched_smoke.json -- matched-smoke --run-lock /opt/fpct-lock/immutable_v1_run_lock.json --output-root /fpct-run/results
shell_guards: /opt/conda/bin/python3.11 -c 'import json; p=json.load(open("/fpct-run/results/immutable_final.json")); assert p["classification"] == "R2M_IMMUTABLE_GO" and p["training_authorized"] is True'

args:
set -euo pipefail
/opt/conda/bin/python3.11 -c 'import json; p=json.load(open("/fpct-run/results/immutable_final.json")); s=json.load(open("/fpct-run/results/diagnostic_seed_104729/matched_smoke_manifest.json")); assert p["classification"] == "R2M_IMMUTABLE_GO" and p["training_authorized"] is True and s["status"] == "GO"'
/opt/conda/bin/python3.11 -I /opt/fpct/script/runtime/fpct_bootstrap.py --repo-root /opt/fpct --target /opt/fpct/script/experiment/fpct_confirmatory_runner.py --include-gpu-closure --attestation-out /fpct-run/attestations/seed___SEED__.json -- train-triplet --run-lock /opt/fpct-lock/immutable_v1_run_lock.json --seed __SEED__ --output-root /fpct-run/results
shell_guards: /opt/conda/bin/python3.11 -c 'import json; p=json.load(open("/fpct-run/results/immutable_final.json")); s=json.load(open("/fpct-run/results/diagnostic_seed_104729/matched_smoke_manifest.json")); assert p["classification"] == "R2M_IMMUTABLE_GO" and p["training_authorized"] is True and s["status"] == "GO"'

args:
set -euo pipefail
/opt/conda/bin/python3.11 -c 'import json; p=json.load(open("/fpct-run/results/semantic/semantic_result.json")); assert p["status"] == "GO" and all(p["checks"].values())'
for block in 0 1 2 3 4 5 6 7; do
  output=$(printf '/fpct-run/results/active_canary/blocks/block_%02d.json' "$block")
  attest=$(printf '/fpct-run/attestations/active_block_%02d.json' "$block")
  /opt/conda/bin/python3.11 -I /opt/fpct/script/runtime/fpct_bootstrap.py --repo-root /opt/fpct --target /opt/fpct/script/experiment/fpct_gpu_r2k_latency.py --include-gpu-closure --attestation-out "$attest" -- block --run-lock /opt/fpct-lock/immutable_v1_run_lock.json --panel /opt/fpct/recipe/eval_recipe/fpct_gpu_r2/diagnostic_panel_manifest.json --data-root /datasets/c2c --block-index "$block" --output "$output"
done
/opt/conda/bin/python3.11 -I /opt/fpct/script/runtime/fpct_bootstrap.py --repo-root /opt/fpct --target /opt/fpct/script/experiment/fpct_gpu_r2k_latency.py --include-gpu-closure --attestation-out /fpct-run/attestations/active_aggregate.json -- aggregate --root /fpct-run/results/active_canary/blocks --output /fpct-run/results/active_canary/aggregate.json
/opt/conda/bin/python3.11 -I /opt/fpct/script/runtime/fpct_bootstrap.py --repo-root /opt/fpct --target /opt/fpct/script/analysis/fpct_gpu_r2m_finalize.py --include-gpu-closure --attestation-out /fpct-run/attestations/immutable_final.json -- --original-result /fpct-run/results/pretrained_matrix/pretrained_r2_result.json --semantic-result /fpct-run/results/semantic/semantic_result.json --active-aggregate /fpct-run/results/active_canary/aggregate.json --output /fpct-run/results/immutable_final.json

set -euo pipefail
cp /opt/fpct-lock/immutable_v1_run_lock.json /preflight/main_lock.json
expected=$(/opt/conda/bin/python3.11 -c 'import json; print(json.load(open("/opt/fpct-lock/preflight_binding_manifest.json"))["run_lock_raw_sha256"])')
/opt/conda/bin/python3.11 -I /opt/fpct/script/runtime/fpct_bootstrap.py \
  --repo-root /opt/fpct \
  --target /opt/fpct/script/analysis/fpct_gpu_r2m_config_validator.py \
  --attestation-out /fpct-run/attestations/config_preflight.json \
  -- preflight \
  --repo /opt/fpct \
  --lock /opt/fpct-lock/immutable_v1_run_lock.json \
  --schema /opt/fpct/recipe/eval_recipe/fpct_gpu_r2m/run_lock.schema.json \
  --canonical-geometry /opt/fpct/recipe/eval_recipe/fpct_gpu_r2m/canonical_resource_geometry.json \
  --consumer-manifest /opt/fpct/recipe/eval_recipe/fpct_gpu_r2m/consumer_pointer_manifest.json \
  --allowlist /opt/fpct/recipe/eval_recipe/fpct_gpu_r2m/implementation_allowlist.json \
  --expected-run-uid fpct-r2m-80fb295-v1 \
  --expected-root /netdisk/lijunsi/fpct-confirmatory/fpct-r2m-80fb295-v1 \
  --expected-commit 80fb295542ad298fae4cddb1273517b401bbcd17 \
  --expected-raw-sha256 "$expected" \
  --configmap-object /fpct-run/preflight/configmap_object.json \
  --mounted-lock /preflight/init_lock.json \
  --container-lock /preflight/main_lock.json \
  --output /fpct-run/preflight/config_preflight_result.json

command: /host/k3s ctr --address /run/k3s/containerd/containerd.sock --namespace k8s.io images import /fpct-run/assets/fpct-gpu-r2m-80fb295.tar && /host/k3s ctr --address /run/k3s/containerd/containerd.sock --namespace k8s.io images tag docker.io/library/fpct-gpu-r2m:80fb295-final docker.io/library/fpct-gpu-r2m:80fb295@sha256:0ea40657a38dbe8778ef492474f28ef2360156f4c9b0f8287e2bb0988d695851 && /host/k3s ctr --address /run/k3s/containerd/containerd.sock --namespace k8s.io images tag docker.io/library/fpct-gpu-r2m:80fb295-final docker.io/library/fpct-gpu-r2m@sha256:0ea40657a38dbe8778ef492474f28ef2360156f4c9b0f8287e2bb0988d695851

args:
set -euo pipefail
/opt/conda/bin/python3.11 -c 'import json; p=json.load(open("/fpct-run/results/immutable_final.json")); assert p["classification"] == "R2M_IMMUTABLE_GO" and p["training_authorized"] is True'
/opt/conda/bin/python3.11 -I /opt/fpct/script/runtime/fpct_bootstrap.py --repo-root /opt/fpct --target /opt/fpct/script/experiment/fpct_confirmatory_runner.py --include-gpu-closure --attestation-out /fpct-run/attestations/matched_smoke.json -- matched-smoke --run-lock /opt/fpct-lock/immutable_v1_run_lock.json --output-root /fpct-run/results

/opt/conda/bin/python3.11 -c 'import json; p=json.load(open("/fpct-run/results/immutable_final.json")); s=json.load(open("/fpct-run/results/diagnostic_seed_104729/matched_smoke_manifest.json")); assert p["classification"] == "R2M_IMMUTABLE_GO" and p["training_authorized"] is True and s["status"] == "GO"'
/opt/conda/bin/python3.11 -I /opt/fpct/script/runtime/fpct_bootstrap.py --repo-root /opt/fpct --target /opt/fpct/script/experiment/fpct_confirmatory_runner.py --include-gpu-closure --attestation-out /fpct-run/attestations/seed___SEED__.json -- train-triplet --run-lock /opt/fpct-lock/immutable_v1_run_lock.json --seed __SEED__ --output-root /fpct-run/results

args:

/opt/conda/bin/python3.11 -c 'import json; p=json.load(open("/fpct-run/results/pretrained_matrix/pretrained_r2_result.json")); assert p["status"] == "GO" and len(p["checks"]) == 23 and all(p["checks"].values())'
/opt/conda/bin/python3.11 -I /opt/fpct/script/runtime/fpct_bootstrap.py --repo-root /opt/fpct --target /opt/fpct/script/experiment/fpct_gpu_r2l_runner.py --include-gpu-closure --attestation-out /fpct-run/attestations/semantic_synthetic.json -- synthetic --output /fpct-run/results/semantic/synthetic/synthetic.json
/opt/conda/bin/python3.11 -I /opt/fpct/script/runtime/fpct_bootstrap.py --repo-root /opt/fpct --target /opt/fpct/script/experiment/fpct_gpu_r2l_runner.py --include-gpu-closure --attestation-out /fpct-run/attestations/qwen_decode4.json -- qwen-decode4 --output /fpct-run/results/semantic/qwen_decode4/qwen_decode4.json
/opt/conda/bin/python3.11 -I /opt/fpct/script/runtime/fpct_bootstrap.py --repo-root /opt/fpct --target /opt/fpct/script/experiment/fpct_gpu_r2l_runner.py --include-gpu-closure --attestation-out /fpct-run/attestations/semantic_aggregate.json -- semantic-aggregate --original-result /fpct-run/results/pretrained_matrix/pretrained_r2_result.json --conditions-root /fpct-run/results/pretrained_matrix --floors /fpct-run/results/gpu_gate/metric_null_floors.json --synthetic /fpct-run/results/semantic/synthetic/synthetic.json --qwen-decode4 /fpct-run/results/semantic/qwen_decode4/qwen_decode4.json --output /fpct-run/results/semantic/semantic_result.json
shell_guards: /opt/conda/bin/python3.11 -c 'import json; p=json.load(open("/fpct-run/results/pretrained_matrix/pretrained_r2_result.json")); assert p["status"] == "GO" and len(p["checks"]) == 23 and all(p["checks"].values())'
